summary: A unit test timed out: form.Run() in huh_prompter_test.go did not complete within the test timeout.
root_cause: Test timeout: form.Run() in huh_prompter_test.go did not complete in time, causing the test to fail.

evidence.quote: huh_prompter_test.go:478: form.Run() did not complete in time
evidence.reason: Direct test output indicating the test at that file/line failed because form.Run() exceeded the allowed runtime.

suggested_fix: Reproduce the failure locally by running the test in huh_prompter_test.go, instrument form.Run() to see why it blocks, and either fix the blocking behavior or increase the test timeout. Add logging or timeouts within form.Run() to ensure it completes within test time limits.
